blended.narrative: Mont-Sainte-Anne is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,918 ft. Looking ahead, 29 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
